questions.question: He said, "Play games." → He told me ___ games.
questions.explanation: 命令文の間接話法は told + 人 + to + 動詞の原形です

questions.question: He said, "Don't play games." → He told me ___ games.
questions.explanation: 否定の命令文は not to + 動詞の原形です

questions.question: He said, "Study hard." → He told me ___ hard.
questions.explanation: 命令文の間接話法は told + 人 + to + 動詞の原形です

questions.question: He said, "Don't be late." → He told me ___ late.
questions.explanation: 否定の命令文は not to + 動詞の原形です

questions.question: She said, "Be quiet." → She told me ___ quiet.
questions.explanation: 命令文の間接話法は told + 人 + to + 動詞の原形です

questions.question: He said, "Help me." → He asked me ___ him.
questions.explanation: 依頼の命令文は asked + 人 + to + 動詞の原形です

questions.question: She said, "Don't touch that." → She told me ___ that.
questions.explanation: 否定の命令文は not to + 動詞の原形です

questions.question: 命令文の間接話法で使う動詞は？
questions.explanation: 命令文の間接話法は told または asked を使います
